✨ DaisyP • Producer • Vocalist • Sound Explorer

Playful, purple-tinted sound with an experimental soul.

Maria Pizarro is the person, DaisyP is the music persona, and Daisy Time is the online world around it. Based in Aylesbury, England, she is a Portuguese producer, vocalist, and performer whose work blends expressive vocals, hands-on production, and a love for unusual textures, creating music that feels curious, colourful, and emotionally alive.

A bubbly creative voice shaping bold, experimental sounds through production, performance, and feeling.

About Maria

A genre-curious producer with a performer’s heart.

Maria brings together technical production training, expressive performance, and a warm creative personality. She is drawn to music that takes risks: strange sounds, unexpected textures, emotional vocals, and ideas that do not sit neatly inside one box.

🎓

Creative Music Graduate

With both a Bachelor's and Master's in Creative Music Production from ICMP, Maria has spent years developing her sound, workflow, and creative confidence.

🎙️

Voice-Led Performer

Her background in singing and live performance gives her music a human centre: expressive, energetic, and rooted in connection.

🎛️

Hands-On Producer

From building arrangements to mixing and mastering, Maria enjoys shaping ideas from raw sketches into finished, characterful tracks.

Bio: Maria Pizarro is the professional name, DaisyP is the artist identity, and Daisy Time is the online persona that carries her creative world across platforms. She is a Portuguese music producer, vocalist, and performer with a love for experimental sound and expressive storytelling. After completing both a Bachelor's and Master's in Creative Music Production at ICMP, she is now seeking her next step in the music industry. Her creative style is colourful, open-minded, and full of personality, combining vocals, guitar, piano, production, mixing, and mastering into a flexible skillset built for collaboration, learning, and growth.

Education & Experience

A creative foundation shaped by study, projects, and performance.

Maria's background combines academic training with years of practical music-making, from university production projects to performing with friends in Portugal.

ICMP Graduate

Five years of Creative Music Production.

Maria completed both her Bachelor's and Master's in Creative Music Production at ICMP, building a strong foundation in recording, arranging, production, mixing, mastering, and creative project development.

That academic path sits alongside real performance experience, giving her a practical understanding of both the technical and emotional sides of music.

Education

  • Bachelor's in Creative Music Production at ICMP, focused on developing a strong creative and technical foundation.
  • Master's in Creative Music Production at ICMP, expanding her approach to production, experimentation, and finished musical work.
  • Five years of project-based music creation, covering recording, arrangement, performance, mixing, mastering, and creative development.

Experience

  • Performed with friends in a band around Portugal, building confidence, collaboration skills, and real live-music experience.
  • Produced a wide range of songs and university projects across five years of Creative Music Production study.
  • Comfortable moving between vocals, instruments, production decisions, arrangement ideas, and final audio polish.
  • Open to remote work, commuting, and flexible roles that offer hands-on experience in the music industry.
Professional singing Live performance Guitar Piano Music production Mixing Mastering Experimental music

Career Direction

Ready to bring energy, adaptability, and creativity into the industry.

Maria is looking for opportunities across the music industry where she can learn, contribute, and grow. She is open to a wide range of roles, from production and studio support to performance, events, creative assistance, and artist-focused work. What matters most is gaining real experience, being useful to a team, and staying close to music.

🎤

Vocalist / Performer

Expressive vocal ability, live performance experience, and a natural connection to musical storytelling.

🎛️

Production Assistant

Creative Music Production training with practical experience in arranging, producing, mixing, and mastering tracks.

🎸

Live Music Support

Band experience, instrumental ability, and an understanding of how music comes together in real performance settings.

🎧

Studio / Audio Roles

A hands-on, curious approach to audio work with a strong interest in learning from professional environments.

📍

Local or Remote

Based in Aylesbury, England, with remote availability and the ability to commute for the right opportunity.

✨

Creative Team Player

Bubbly, flexible, and open-minded, ready to support projects, artists, studios, venues, or music teams.
